title: 10 best herbal capsules for fluid retention
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for fluid retention are natural supplements that contain potent herbs and plant extracts, specifically designed to alleviate symptoms associated with water retention. These capsules help to reduce excess fluid in the body by stimulating urine production, improving blood circulation, and relaxing the smooth muscles around blood vessels. Examples of herbal capsules that can help with fluid retention include Dandelion root, Buchu leaf, and Uva ursi extract. By using these natural remedies, individuals can experience significant improvements in their overall health and well-being, such as reduced bloating, improved digestion, and increased energy levels.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with fluid retention because they contain diuretic properties that stimulate urine production, allowing the body to naturally eliminate excess water. The plant's roots and leaves have been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various conditions related to fluid imbalance, including bloating and swelling. By increasing urine output, dandelion capsules can help reduce water retention, alleviate discomfort, and promote overall digestive health. This natural approach can be especially beneficial for individuals with chronic fluid retention issues or those experiencing mild edema.
remedy_properties: Diuretic properties: Dandelion root and leaves contain compounds that increase urine production, helping to flush out excess fluids and reduce edema.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Dandelion's anti-inflammatory compounds can reduce swelling and alleviate discomfort associated with fluid retention in the body.
Potassium-rich content: Dandelion is a rich source of potassium, an essential mineral that helps regulate fluid balance in the body by promoting water excretion and reducing sodium reabsorption.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These plant compounds help reduce fluid retention by improving blood vessel function, which in turn reduces blood pressure and minimizes water retention in the body.
Inulin: As a soluble fiber, inulin helps flush out excess fluids from the body by increasing the frequency and volume of bowel movements, preventing water from accumulating in tissues.

Taraxasterol: This triterpenoid saponin may aid in reducing fluid retention by inhibiting the reabsorption of sodium ions in the kidneys, which in turn reduces water reabsorption and promotes diuresis (increased urine production).
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used due to their diuretic properties, which help in reducing fluid retention.
Roots: They are used because they contain inulin, a natural compound that acts as a diuretic and helps in reducing fluid retention.
Seeds: They are used due to their diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help in reducing fluid retention and swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 taraxacum officinale flowers and leaves in the early morning to ensure optimal potency.
Dry the harvested taraxacum officinale flowers and leaves in a single layer for 1-2 weeks.
Grind 2-3 tablespoons of dried taraxacum officinale into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 1 part of the taraxacum officinale powder with 2 parts of a natural capsule filler such as rice flour.
Fill 20-30 empty vegetarian capsules with the taraxacum officinale mixture and seal them immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with fluid retention because they contain mucilage, a natural substance that soothes and protects the mucous membranes in the body. When taken orally, the mucilage coats the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and irritation, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fluid retention such as bloating and swelling. Additionally, marshmallow's anti-inflammatory properties can also help to reduce water retention by reducing inflammation in the body's tissues.
remedy_properties: Mucoactive properties: Marshmallow root has mucilage, a thick, protective substance that helps soothe and protect the mucous membranes, reducing inflammation and swelling associated with fluid retention.

Demulcent properties: Marshmallow root's demulcent properties create a barrier on the gut lining, preventing toxins and irritants from penetrating and reducing inflammation, which can contribute to fluid retention.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Marshmallow root contains anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce swelling and pain associated with fluid retention, making it an effective natural remedy for alleviating symptoms.
remedy_constituents: Mucilages: Mucilages help to reduce fluid retention by forming a protective barrier around the mucous membranes, allowing them to absorb and retain water, thereby reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with fluid retention.

Flavonoids (specifically kaempferol and quercetin): Flavonoids help to reduce fluid retention by inhibiting the activity of certain enzymes involved in the retention of fluids, as well as by reducing inflammation and improving the permeability of blood vessels.

Polysaccharides (specifically arabinogalactan): Polysaccharides help to reduce fluid retention by stimulating the immune system to produce anti-inflammatory substances, reducing inflammation and improving the overall health of the mucous membranes, thereby reducing fluid retention.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are used because they contain a high concentration of mucilages, which help to reduce inflammation and swelling, thereby alleviating fluid retention symptoms.
Leaves: They are used because they also contain mucilages, which have similar soothing and anti-inflammatory effects to the roots, making them effective for fluid retention relief.
Stems: They are used because they can be a more readily available and accessible alternative to the roots and leaves, still containing some mucilage content that helps with fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30 to 40 grams of dried root of althaea officinalis from a trusted supplier.
Grind 10 grams of the harvested root into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
Mix the ground powder with 10 grams of vegetable cellulose powder and 5 grams of magnesium stearate.
Fill 100-count gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the mixture using a capsule filler machine.
Label and store the filled capsules in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Bearberry capsules helps with fluid retention because they contain anthocyanosides, powerful flavonoids that help to strengthen blood vessels and improve their permeability. This allows for more efficient removal of excess fluids from the body, reducing swelling and bloating caused by water retention. Additionally, bearberry's diuretic properties increase urine production, flushing out toxins and excess sodium, which can contribute to fluid retention. By addressing these underlying causes, bearberry capsules provide effective relief from fluid retention symptoms, promoting a healthy balance of bodily fluids.
remedy_properties: Anthraquinone glycosides: Bearberry capsules contain anthraquinone glycosides, which have diuretic properties that help to increase urine production and reduce excess fluid in the body.
Tannins: Tannins in bearberry capsules have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling and alleviate discomfort associated with fluid retention.

Ursolic acid: Ursolic acid, a triterpenoid found in bearberry capsules, has been shown to inhibit the activity of an enzyme that regulates sodium reabsorption in the kidneys, thereby helping to reduce fluid retention.
remedy_constituents: Arbutin: It helps reduce fluid retention by inhibiting the reabsorption of water and electrolytes in the kidneys, promoting diuresis and reducing swelling.
Hydroquinone (Arbutin's breakdown product): As a metabolite of Arbutin, it also plays a role in reducing fluid retention by promoting diuresis and decreasing the reabsorption of water in the kidneys.

Ellagic acid: Although Ellagic acid primarily acts as an antioxidant, it has also been shown to help with fluid retention by inhibiting the activity of certain enzymes involved in water and electrolyte reabsorption in the kidneys.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves are the primary part used due to their high tannin content, which helps to reduce water retention in the body.
Barks: The barks are used because they contain astringent properties that help to reduce swelling and alleviate fluid retention.
Fruits: The fruits are used, although to a lesser extent, as they also contain astringent properties that aid in reducing fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 pound of fresh or dried arctostaphylos uva ursi leaves and stems in late summer or early fall.
Dry the harvested arctostaphylos uva ursi material in a single layer at 150 degrees fahrenheit for 2 hours.
Grind 200 grams of the dried material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 250 milligrams of the powder with 500 milligrams of vegetable cellulose and 50 milligrams of magnesium stearate.
Fill 1000-count gelatin capsules with the powder mixture and seal them immediately to preserve freshness and potency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Corn capsules helps with fluid retention because they contain a blend of natural herbs that promote the body's natural diuretic functions. The herbal ingredients, such as corn silk and juniper berries, have anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce swelling and ease pressure on the kidneys. This allows the body to naturally eliminate excess fluids, reducing water retention and alleviating symptoms of bloating and discomfort. By supporting kidney function and promoting healthy digestion, herbal corn capsules provide a natural solution for fluid retention.
remedy_properties: Dandelion Root: Contains diuretic compounds that increase urine production, helping to reduce excess water retention in the body.
Uva Ursi: Has astringent and anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and relieve pressure on the body's fluid balance system.
Pumpkin Seed: Rich in antioxidants and has natural diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects that can help alleviate fluid retention by improving blood circulation and reducing inflammation.
remedy_constituents: Phytic Acid: Helps with fluid retention by binding to minerals such as potassium and magnesium, preventing excessive water retention and reducing swelling.
Ferulic Acid: Acts as a diuretic, increasing urine production and helping the body eliminate excess fluids and toxins that contribute to fluid retention.
Zea mays Lipopolysaccharides (LPS): May have a diuretic effect by stimulating the kidneys to produce more urine, reducing fluid buildup in the body.
remedy_parts: Seeds: They are used due to their high content of diuretic compounds and antioxidants.
Leaves: Corn leaves are used due to their rich source of flavonoids and other compounds with diuretic properties.
Stems: Corn stems contain water-repelling properties and are used to make capsules that help reduce fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Collect 100g of dried zea mays flowers and leaves with 2:1 ratio of flowers to leaves in a clean container.
Grind the dried zea mays into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix 20g of the zea mays powder with 10g of gelatin in a bowl and let it sit for 10 minutes.
Add 50ml of distilled water to the mixture and heat it in a double boiler for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the liquid mixture through a fine-mesh filter into empty capsules and seal immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with fluid retention because they contain compounds that stimulate the kidneys to eliminate excess water from the body. The capsules' active ingredients, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, have a diuretic effect, increasing urine production and reducing swelling caused by fluid buildup. Additionally, maidenhair tree's antioxidants help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to fluid retention. As a result, taking maidenhair tree capsules can provide relief from symptoms of water retention, such as bloating, puffiness, and discomfort.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Ginkgo biloba extracts contain flavonoids and terpenoids that have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms associated with fluid retention.
Antioxidant activity: Ginkgo biloba's antioxidant properties may help protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to fluid retention issues.
Vasodilatory effects: The extract's ability to dilate blood vessels may help improve circulation and reduce swelling associated with fluid retention.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: Help with fluid retention by improving blood vessel function and reducing inflammation, which in turn decreases fluid accumulation in tissues.
Terpenoids: Assist in reducing fluid retention by inhibiting the reabsorption of sodium and water in the kidneys, promoting diuresis and reducing fluid buildup in the body.
Bilobalide: Contribute to alleviating fluid retention by enhancing the permeability of blood vessels and promoting the excretion of excess fluids and electrolytes through urination.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Extracted from the leaves of Ginkgo biloba, they are used in fluid retention capsules due to their potential anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties.
Barks: The barks of Ginkgo biloba are sometimes used in fluid retention capsules, as they contain compounds that may help reduce water retention and alleviate swelling.
Seeds: Ginkgo biloba seeds, which are often used in traditional medicine, are also used in fluid retention capsules due to their potential diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10-20 ginkgo biloba leaves from mature trees, preferably in early autumn when leaves change color.
Dry the leaves in a single layer at 70-80 degrees fahrenheit for 2-3 days to reduce moisture content.
Grind 1 gram of dried leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 300-500 milligrams of the powder with 10-20 milliliters of a vegetable-based oil in a small bowl.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the oil mixture, using 1-2 capsules per serving and sealing them tightly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle capsules helps with fluid retention because they contain a wealth of bioactive compounds that have a diuretic effect on the body. The plant's leaves, stems, and flowers are rich in flavonoids, carotenoids, and other phytochemicals that work together to reduce inflammation and promote healthy blood vessel function. By decreasing swelling and relaxing constricted blood vessels, stinging nettle capsules help remove excess fluid from the body, alleviating symptoms of water retention and promoting overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Diuretic properties: Stinging nettle capsules have been shown to increase urine production, helping to flush out excess fluids and reduce swelling due to their ability to stimulate the kidneys to excrete more water.

Anti-inflammatory effects: The anti-inflammatory compounds in stinging nettle capsules may help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with fluid retention, such as pain and discomfort.

Antioxidant properties: Stinging nettle's antioxidant activity helps protect the body from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to fluid retention and other health issues.
remedy_constituents: Triterpenoid Saponins: These compounds help with fluid retention by inhibiting the sodium-potassium pump in the kidneys, reducing the amount of water reabsorbed and promoting its excretion.

Phenolic Acids (e.g., Chlorogenic Acid, Caffeic Acid): These compounds aid in reducing fluid retention by inhibiting the activity of aldosterone, a hormone that regulates sodium and water balance in the body.

Steroidal Saponins (e.g., Urticoside): These compounds help with fluid retention by improving kidney function, enhancing the excretion of water and electrolytes, and reducing inflammation in the body.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves of Urtica dioica are most commonly used due to their high content of diuretic compounds that help in reducing fluid retention.
Roots: The roots of Urtica dioica are also used as they contain stinging compounds called urticins, which help in reducing inflammation and promoting diuresis.
Stems: The stems of Urtica dioica are occasionally used, as they have similar properties to the leaves and roots, helping to reduce fluid retention and inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 25 grams of fresh urtica dioica leaves and stems on a dry sunny morning for maximum potency.
Clean the harvested plant material thoroughly to remove dirt and debris within 15 minutes.
Dry the cleaned urtica dioica plant material in a temperature-controlled environment at 50 degrees celsius for 24 hours.
Grind 10 grams of the dried urtica dioica plant material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder within 5 minutes.
Fill gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the powdered urtica dioica plant material and seal immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yarrow capsules helps with fluid retention because they contain the herb Achillea millefolium, which has natural diuretic properties. The bioactive compounds in yarrow, such as flavonoids and terpenes, stimulate the kidneys to increase urine production, reducing excess water and sodium buildup in the body. This helps to alleviate swelling, bloating, and discomfort associated with fluid retention, making it a popular natural remedy for conditions like edema, water retention, and menstrual bloating. Regular use of yarrow capsules can promote healthy circulation and relieve pressure on the cardiovascular system.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Yarrow contains antioxidants that help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to fluid retention by reducing the body's ability to eliminate excess fluids.
Diuretic properties: Yarrow has been shown to increase urine production and improve kidney function, helping to remove excess water and electrolytes from the body and alleviate fluid retention.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Yarrow's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to fluid retention by reducing blood vessel permeability and improving lymphatic drainage.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These plant compounds help reduce fluid retention by improving blood vessel function, thereby enhancing the removal of excess fluids from the body.

Rosmarinic acid: A type of phenolic compound, rosmarinic acid reduces fluid retention by inhibiting the activity of enzymes involved in the production of pro-inflammatory substances that can contribute to fluid buildup.

Achillanthein: A sesquiterpene lactone found in Achillea millefolium, achillanthein may help alleviate fluid retention by exerting a diuretic effect and improving kidney function, allowing the body to efficiently remove excess fluids.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are the most commonly used part due to their high concentration of phenolic compounds and essential oils, which help reduce fluid retention.
Flowers: They are used for their antispasmodic and diuretic properties, which help alleviate bloating and water retention.
Roots: They are sometimes used to enhance the diuretic effects of the other parts, adding to the overall efficacy of the capsules for fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh achillea millefolium leaves and flowers in the morning when they are at their highest potency level.
Dry the harvested plant material in a low-temperature oven at 150 degrees fahrenheit for 1-2 hours.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered plant material with a binding agent like gelatin or vegetable cellulose in a 1:10 ratio.
Fill empty gelatin or vegetable cellulose capsules with the herbal powder mixture using an encapsulation machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenrod capsules helps with fluid retention because they contain extracts of Solidago virgaurea, a natural diuretic that encourages the kidneys to release excess water and electrolytes. This herb has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as edema, bloating, and swelling by increasing urine production and reducing inflammation in the body. By promoting healthy digestion and circulation, goldenrod capsules can help reduce fluid accumulation in tissues and alleviate associated discomforts like weight gain, fatigue, and joint pain.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Goldenrod contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling and alleviate water retention caused by inflammation in the body.

Diuretic effects: Goldenrod has been traditionally used as a natural diuretic, stimulating urine production and helping to remove excess fluids and toxins from the body, thereby reducing fluid retention.

Antioxidant properties: Goldenrod's antioxidant compounds can help protect against oxidative stress and damage to cells, which may contribute to conditions like edema (excessive fluid accumulation in tissues) by neutralizing free radicals that can cause inflammation and tissue damage.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: Flavonoids present in Solidago virgaurea capsules have diuretic properties, which help to increase urine production and reduce fluid retention in the body.

Sesquiterpene lactones: Sesquiterpene lactones, such as solidagolide, have anti-inflammatory properties and may help to reduce water retention by modulating the body's inflammatory response and improving circulation.

Triterpenoids: Triterpenoids, including ursolic acid and oleanolic acid, have been found to have diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which may contribute to their ability to help reduce fluid retention.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used to make capsules due to their diuretic properties, which help in reducing fluid retention.
Roots: They are used to make capsules as they contain compounds that can help in reducing inflammation and promoting the elimination of excess fluids.
Stems: They are used to make capsules due to their ability to stimulate the kidneys and promote the excretion of fluids.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 250g of dried solidago virgaurea flowers at 10am on a sunny day to ensure optimal potency.
Grind 150g of the dried solidago virgaurea flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix the ground solidago virgaurea powder with 50g of cellulose powder in a large bowl for 5 minutes.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with 250mg of the solidago virgaurea mixture using a small spoon for 10 minutes.
Label and store the 100 filled gelatin capsules in a cool dark place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Field horsetail capsules helps with fluid retention because they contain compounds that have natural diuretic properties, increasing urine production and reducing water accumulation in the body. The capsules also help to break down and eliminate excess sodium in the body, which can contribute to fluid retention. Additionally, field horsetail is rich in silicon and other minerals that promote healthy connective tissue function, reducing inflammation and improving circulation, both of which can aid in reducing fluid buildup and alleviating related discomforts such as bloating and swelling.
remedy_properties: Silica content: Horsetail contains high amounts of silica, which helps to strengthen connective tissue and improve circulation, reducing swelling and fluid buildup in the body.
Diuretic properties: The plant's natural diuretic compounds stimulate urine production, helping to eliminate excess water and sodium from the body, reducing fluid retention and bloating.

Antioxidant activity: Horsetail's antioxidant properties help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to fluid retention and swelling, and also support overall health and well-being.
remedy_constituents: Saponins: Saponins in Equisetum arvense help reduce fluid retention by increasing urine production, which in turn reduces the amount of fluid in the body.
Phenolic acids: Phenolic acids in Equisetum arvense have anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms associated with fluid retention.
Flavonoids: Flavonoids in Equisetum arvense help improve blood circulation, which can aid in the removal of excess fluids and toxins from the body, reducing fluid retention.
remedy_parts: Roots: Roots are the primary part used due to their high concentration of compounds that help to reduce fluid retention.
Stems: Stems are also used, as they contain similar compounds to the roots, contributing to the reduction of fluid retention.
Leaves: Leaves are occasionally used, with their own unique set of compounds that aid in alleviating fluid retention symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried equisetum arvense plant material from a reputable source.
Dry the plant material at 50c for 2 hours in a drying oven.
Grind 30 grams of dried plant material into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 gram of the powder with 9 grams of gelatin in a small bowl.
Fill empty vegetable capsules with the gelatin mixture using a capsule filling machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Purslane capsules helps with fluid retention because they contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to reduce swelling and edema. The natural diuretic properties of purslane also stimulate the body's natural detoxification processes, promoting the excretion of excess fluids and electrolytes. Additionally, the herb's ability to relax blood vessels and improve circulation can also help to reduce fluid buildup in the body. As a result, purslane capsules may provide relief from symptoms associated with fluid retention, such as bloating, swelling, and weight gain.
remedy_properties: Diuretic Properties: Purslane capsules have been shown to increase urine output, helping to reduce fluid buildup in the body and alleviate symptoms of water retention, such as bloating and swelling.

Inflammation Reduction: Purslane's anti-inflammatory compounds may help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to fluid retention and edema, making it an effective natural remedy for these conditions.

Antioxidant Activity: Purslane's antioxidant properties may help protect the kidneys from damage caused by oxidative stress, improving their ability to filter excess fluids and waste products, reducing fluid retention and promoting overall kidney health.
remedy_constituents: Phenolic acids: These compounds have been shown to inhibit the reabsorption of sodium and water in the kidneys, thereby reducing fluid retention.
Saponins: Saponins in Portulaca oleracea help to reduce fluid retention by increasing the permeability of the blood vessels, allowing excess fluids to be eliminated more efficiently.
Amino acids (including alanine): The amino acids present in Portulaca oleracea may help to reduce fluid retention by promoting the excretion of excess fluids through the urine.
remedy_parts: Seeds: The seeds are used due to their high concentration of saponins, which can help reduce water retention.
Leaves: The leaves are used because they contain diuretic properties that help increase urine production and reduce fluid retention.
Roots: The roots are used due to their high content of mucilages, which can help reduce inflammation and alleviate water retention symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh portulaca oleracea leaves and stems from a clean pesticide-free area for 30 minutes.
Dry the harvested portulaca oleracea leaves and stems in a low-temperature oven at 50 degrees celsius for 2 hours.
Grind the dried portulaca oleracea leaves and stems into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 250 milligrams of the powdered portulaca oleracea with 500 milligrams of vegetable cellulose to create a uniform blend for 5 minutes.
Fill gelatin capsules with the uniform blend and seal them using a capsule filling machine for 1 hour.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Red clover capsules helps with fluid retention because it contains isoflavones, which have a diuretic effect that stimulates the kidneys to excrete excess water and sodium from the body. Additionally, red clover's flavonoids help to improve blood vessel function, reducing inflammation and improving circulation, which can also contribute to reduced fluid retention. By addressing underlying causes of fluid buildup, red clover capsules may provide relief from symptoms such as bloating, swelling, and discomfort associated with fluid retention.
remedy_properties: Isoflavones: Red clover contains a high concentration of isoflavones, which have been shown to help reduce inflammation and improve blood vessel function, leading to decreased fluid buildup in tissues.
Phytoestrogens: The phytoestrogenic compounds in red clover capsules can help regulate hormonal imbalances that contribute to fluid retention by mimicking the effects of estrogen in the body.
Saponins: Saponins present in red clover have been found to have diuretic properties, increasing urine production and helping to eliminate excess fluids from the body.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids, which help to reduce inflammation and edema caused by fluid retention.
Seeds: Containing a unique compound called isoflavone, which has been shown to improve urinary tract function and reduce swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried red clover flowers measuring 200-250 grams and store them in an airtight container.
Grind the dried red clover flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix 2 tablespoons of the ground red clover powder with 1 tablespoon of organic gelatin and 10 ounces of distilled water to form a paste.
Fill empty capsules with the red clover paste mixture and seal them immediately to maintain potency and freshness.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container and consume within 6 months or as directed by a healthcare professional.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with fluid retention because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce swelling and edema in the body. The active compound curcumin in turmeric capsules has a diuretic effect, increasing urine production and promoting the elimination of excess fluids from the body. Additionally, turmeric's antiseptic and antioxidant properties help to maintain healthy blood vessels and tissues, preventing water retention and reducing symptoms such as bloating, swelling, and stiffness. This natural remedy can provide relief from fluid retention and promote overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Turmeric's curcuminoids have potent anti-inflammatory effects, which can reduce swelling and inflammation caused by fluid retention, allowing excess water to be reabsorbed into the bloodstream.
Diuretic properties: The active compound curcumin in turmeric has been shown to increase urine production, helping to flush out excess fluids and sodium from the body, reducing fluid retention.

Antioxidant activity: Turmeric's antioxidants can help protect the kidneys and other organs from oxidative damage, which can contribute to fluid retention and swelling, promoting healthy blood flow and circulation.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Turmeric rhyzomes are commonly used because they contain a high concentration of curcuminoids, which have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce fluid retention.

Roots: Turmeric roots are utilized due to their rich content of bioactive compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which have been shown to have diuretic effects and aid in the removal of excess fluids from the body.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of fresh turmeric root from a trusted source ensuring optimal quality.
Dry the harvested turmeric in a well-ventilated area at room temperature for 7 days.
Grind 50 grams of dried turmeric into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or spice grinder.
Mix the turmeric powder with 250 milliliters of distilled water to create a paste and simmer for 10 minutes.
Fill empty capsules with 500 milligrams of the curcuma longa paste and seal immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with fluid retention because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that acts as a natural diuretic. This compound increases urine production, allowing the body to excrete excess fluids and reduce swelling. Additionally, licorice root has anti-inflammatory properties that help to alleviate inflammation and discomfort associated with fluid retention. By promoting healthy blood flow and reducing water retention, herbal licorice capsules provide natural relief from bloating, edema, and other symptoms related to fluid buildup.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This compound helps reduce inflammation and edema (swelling) in the body by inhibiting the production of inflammatory mediators, which can contribute to fluid retention.
Licoricidin: This flavonoid has been shown to increase urine output by stimulating the kidneys to excrete excess fluids, reducing fluid buildup in the body.

Amino acids and sugars: Herbal licorice capsules contain a mixture of amino acids (such as glycine and glutamic acid) and sugars that help regulate water balance in the body by influencing electrolyte levels and promoting diuresis (excretion of urine).
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps reduce water retention by inhibiting the production of aldosterone, a hormone that regulates electrolyte balance.
Barks: Containing flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate symptoms associated with fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried glycyrrhiza glabra root, ensuring it is of high quality and free from contaminants for use in the herbal capsule production.
Grind the harvested glycyrrhiza glabra root into a fine powder using a mill or coffee grinder for optimal extraction.
Mix 250-500mg of the powdered glycyrrhiza glabra with other herbal ingredients and excipients in a ratio of 1:1, then add a small amount of glycerin to enhance capsule formation.
Fill hard gelatin capsules with the prepared mixture and seal them by hand or using an automated machine for precise filling and sealing.
Store the herbal capsules in an airtight container at room temperature, away from direct sunlight and moisture, for up to 12 months before use as directed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Juniper capsules helps with fluid retention because they stimulate the kidneys to eliminate excess fluids from the body. The active compound, sabine, found in juniper berries, increases urine production by enhancing blood circulation and reducing inflammation. This helps to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of water retention, such as bloating, weight gain, and puffy skin. Additionally, juniper capsules may also help to reduce sodium levels in the body, which can contribute to fluid retention. By promoting healthy kidney function, juniper capsules provide a natural solution for managing fluid retention.
remedy_properties: Diuretic property: Juniper berries contain compounds that increase urine production, helping to eliminate excess fluids from the body and reducing swelling.

Anti-inflammatory property: Juniper's anti-inflammatory effects help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to fluid retention and alleviate related symptoms such as pain and discomfort.

Antioxidant property: Juniper's antioxidant properties help protect the body from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to fluid retention and other chronic health issues.
remedy_parts: Roots: Juniper roots are rich in compounds that help to reduce excess water in the body and promote urine production, making them effective for treating fluid retention.
Barks: The barks of the juniper plant contain bioactive compounds that aid in reducing swelling and inflammation, which can contribute to fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Gather dried juniper berries and organic gelatin for capsule production.
Grind 200-300 milligrams of dried juniper berries into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground juniper powder with 50 milliliters of distilled water in a small saucepan to create a decoction.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10-15 minutes before straining.
Fill empty capsules with 250-500 milligrams of the cooled decoction liquid and seal with organic gelatin caps.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Purple coneflower capsules helps with fluid retention because they contain compounds that have a diuretic effect, encouraging the body to eliminate excess fluids through urine. Additionally, the capsules' anti-inflammatory properties help reduce swelling and alleviate discomfort associated with water retention. Furthermore, purple coneflower's natural antioxidant properties may also help protect against oxidative stress, which can contribute to fluid buildup in the body. By addressing these underlying factors, herbal purple coneflower capsules provide a natural solution for reducing fluid retention.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: The capsules contain anti-inflammatory compounds like echinacein, which helps reduce inflammation and swelling in the body, including in the kidneys, which can contribute to fluid retention.

remedy_recipe: Harvest dried echinacea purpurea flowers from a trusted source at the peak of potency.
Grind 30 grams of the dried flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.

Fill #00 empty capsules with approximately 500 milligrams of the powdered mixture, sealing each one individually.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 20 grams of dried ulmus rubra bark and grind it into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered ulmus rubra bark with 100 milliliters of distilled water in a heat-resistant glass container to create an infusion.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 30 minutes, allowing the flavors and properties to combine and extract.
Strain the infusion through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another clean glass container, discarding the solids and retaining the liquid.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with one-half teaspoon of the filtered infusion and seal tightly, resulting in 90 herbal capsules for use.

supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to fluid retention that are treated with herbal capsules are bloating, edema, and water retention. Herbal supplements like dandelion root, celery seed, and parsley leaf are often used to reduce swelling and promote healthy digestion. Other conditions such as menstrual cramps, menopause symptoms, and urinary tract issues can also benefit from herbal capsules containing herbs like ginger, turmeric, and saw palmetto. These natural remedies help alleviate discomfort and support overall well-being.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal capsules that help with fluid retention is Dandelion root, Juniper berries, and Uva Ursi. Dandelion root helps to increase urine production, reducing water retention. Juniper berries aid in improving kidney function and promoting the removal of excess fluids. Uva Ursi, also known as bearberry, has diuretic properties that help to reduce swelling and fluid buildup. This combination supports the body's natural ability to flush out excess fluids, promoting a healthy balance of water in the body.
intro_study: For example, according to a study published by Journal of ethnopharmacology, herbal capsules made from Rosmarinus officinalis L. and Centaurium erythraea L. extracts can be beneficial for fluid retention due to their diuretic properties. The study, which involved administering the aqueous extracts of these plants to Wistar rats over a period of 1 week, found that the daily oral administration of the extracts significantly enhanced diuresis in rats, with the most effective dose for water and electrolyte excretion being 8% for both plants. This diuretic effect, which was observed from the fifth day of treatment onwards, can help to reduce fluid retention by increasing the excretion of sodium, potassium, and chloride.
